summary: Pointwise linear-light color grading: explicit exposure (EV), saturation, and temperature sub-adjustments, optionally gated by a coverage mask.

inputs.name: image
inputs.doc: The linear-light color image to grade.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: Optional coverage mask gating the adjustment per pixel; absent applies the adjustment everywhere.

outputs.name: image
outputs.doc: The graded image (same extent/layout/encoding as the input).

params.name: exposure_ev
params.doc: Linear-light exposure in EV / stops (x -> x * 2^ev); 0 is the identity.

params.name: saturation
params.doc: Saturation blend toward luminance; 0 is the identity, -1 fully desaturates.

params.name: temperature
params.doc: Warm/cool tilt scaling red up and blue down (positive warms); 0 is the identity.

perceptual.reason: color.adjust is a closed-form numeric color transform verified by analytic value tables and algebraic properties (exposure composition, zero-adjustment identity, masked identity); there is no perceptual-quality metric to apply
